title: Pick The Song
description: Bringing the Minecraft music in the form of music discs.
body:
This data pack is a tiny project that brings the Minecraft music in the form of music discs. By the moment only adds the music from Volume Alpha, but I'll add more in the future.

If you find any errors or have a suggestion, you can tell me in the comments or through discord, my tag is "the_maker_cr". I would love to hear your feedback!

Thanks to [Torrezx](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/torrezx/) for creating the textures, go check out his content!

### Video Showcase
